title: Ores Ores Ores
description: This mod adds Vanilla Ores in all Dimensions, and also new ores and tools and armor to the game. It adds a new ore type to the overworld, some vanilla ores and new ores to the Nether and The End, and possibly more in the future.
body:
This mod adds Vanilla Ores in all Dimensions, and also new ores and tools and armor to the game. It adds a new ore type to the overworld, some vanilla ores and new ores to the Nether and The End, and possibly more in the future now lets see whats been added:

 

Note: Its a good idea to have JEI or REI for the recipes and other stuff

 

Compressed Ores:

These ores give more items from each ore, they generate only in the Overworld and only have Vanilla Ores and generate in both Stone and Deepslate variants. 



Nether Ores:

Adds 4 new Nether ores Iron, and Diamond which work the same as Nether Gold Ore. Nether Copper Ore drops Copper Nuggets or Iron Nuggets or Copper Alloy Nuggets. and Nether Redstone Ore drops Redstone Dust or Gold Nuggets or Redstone Alloy Nuggets. (For more info on the Alloys read the paragraphs of the same name)



End Ores:
This adds 6 new End Ores Iron, Gold, Diamond, and Emerald drops Raw or Unrefined version for these items. Ancient Dragon Scales can be smelted into Dragon Scales, and Dragonrite Ore can be smelted into Dragonrite Scrap. (For more info on the Dragon Scales and Dragonrite read the paragraphs of the same name)



Overworld Quartz:

A new way to get Quartz without going into the nether and drops a new king of quartz. (Needs an Iron Pick or above)



Tin Blocks and Items:

Tin can be used as a decoration block or as ingredient in crafting Bronze with Copper.  (Tin Ore requires Stone pick or above to mine)



Amber Blocks and Items:

Amber can be used to craft an Amber Lens which is the best fuel source for furnaces. (Amber Ore requires Iron pick or above to mine)



Bronze:

Is crafted with both Tin nuggets and copper nuggets and has the same mining level as Iron but has a much worse durability.



Copper Alloy:

A new use for both Copper and Iron as its a bit stronger than Iron but not diamond.



Redstone Alloy:

A new use for both Gold and Redstone as its weaker than Copper Alloy and will have more uses in the future.



Dragon Scale Armour:

Its better then Netherite and gives full armour when wearing an elytra. This is crafted with Dragon Scale Armour Plates and Dragonrite Upgrade. Which is crafted with a Netherite Upgrade, Dragon Scale and Dragonrite Scraps.



Dragonrite Tools:

Its better than Netherite and all tools do more damage and mines faster than Netherite. Dragonrite is crafted with 4 Dragonrite Scraps and 4 Diamond Nuggets. Dragonrite Tools are crafted with Dragonrite and a Dragonrite Upgrade. Which is crafted with a Netherite Upgrade, Dragon Scale and Dragonrite Scraps.
